questions.question: What holiday has a name that means 'first fruits' in Swahili?

What observatory's 200-inch, 14-ton mirror is the world's heaviest piece of glass?
What heavyweight was Tony 'Two Ton' Galento referring to when he said in 1939: 'I'll moider de bum'?
What London cabinetmaker opened a factory in 1749 that later became world famous?
